---
title: "Artur Rodrigues"
pagetitle: "Artur Rodrigues | Professor of Finance"
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

<style>
#title-block-header { display: none; }
</style>

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
<p class="eyebrow">Finance · Real Options · Corporate Decisions</p>

# Decisions under uncertainty.

I study how uncertainty, flexibility, and strategic interaction shape investment, financing, and corporate control.

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="research.html">Explore my research</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline" href="assets/cv_artur_rodrigues_en.pdf">Download CV</a>
</div>

<div class="profile-links">
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=E4sUQh0AAAAJ&hl=en">Google Scholar</a>
<span>·</span>
<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7279-4490">ORCID</a>
<span>·</span>
<a href="https://ssrn.com/author=579397">SSRN</a>
<span>·</span>
<a href="mailto:ajrodrigues@fep.up.pt">Email</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.hero-mark aria-hidden="true"}
<div class="mark-ring ring-one"></div>
<div class="mark-ring ring-two"></div>
<div class="mark-axis axis-x"></div>
<div class="mark-axis axis-y"></div>
<div class="mark-curve"></div>
<span class="mark-label label-v">V</span>
<span class="mark-label label-x">X</span>
<span class="mark-label label-star">x*</span>
:::
:::

::: {.content-wrap}
::: {.intro-grid}
::: {.intro-lead}
## Researching consequential choices

My work sits at the intersection of corporate finance and real options. I develop models of investment timing, capital structure, mergers and acquisitions, regulation, and managerial incentives.
:::

::: {.intro-meta}
<div class="stat"><strong>24</strong><span>peer-reviewed publications</span></div>
<div class="stat"><strong>4</strong><span>core research themes</span></div>
<div class="stat"><strong>2007–25</strong><span>publication record</span></div>
:::
:::

## Recent research

::: {.research-cards}
::: {.research-card}
<span class="paper-year">2025</span>

### Investment and leverage decisions under caps and floors

*International Review of Financial Analysis* 97, 103857.

[View publication →](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.irfa.2024.103857)
:::

::: {.research-card}
<span class="paper-year">2023</span>

### Dynamic choice between mergers and tender offers

With E. Lukas and P. J. Pereira. *Journal of Corporate Finance* 83, 102489.

[View publication →](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcorpfin.2023.102489)
:::

::: {.research-card}
<span class="paper-year">2022</span>

### Investment timing, capacity choice, floors and ceilings

With D. Paxson and P. J. Pereira. *Journal of Economic Dynamics and Control* 139, 104430.

[View publication →](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jedc.2022.104430)
:::
:::

<div class="section-cta">
<a href="research.html">See the complete publication record <span>→</span></a>
</div>

## Research themes

::: {.theme-grid}
::: {.theme-item}
<span class="theme-number">01</span>

### Real options

Investment timing, capacity choice, operating flexibility, and decision-making under uncertainty.
:::

::: {.theme-item}
<span class="theme-number">02</span>

### Corporate finance

The interaction between investment policy, leverage, managerial incentives, and firm value.
:::

::: {.theme-item}
<span class="theme-number">03</span>

### Mergers & acquisitions

Deal structure, strategic competition, bargaining, tender offers, and toehold acquisitions.
:::

::: {.theme-item}
<span class="theme-number">04</span>

### Policy & regulation

Price guarantees, subsidies, regulatory uncertainty, and public–private investment.
:::
:::

::: {.affiliation-band}
::: {.affiliation-copy}
<p class="eyebrow">Current position</p>

## Professor of Finance

[School of Economics and Management](https://www.up.pt/fep/en/), University of Porto
:::

::: {.affiliation-location}
Porto, Portugal  
[Get in touch →](about.html#contact)
:::
:::
:::
